# [Kesher] Task title

## Operating contract

Use `AGENTS.md` as the operating contract.

## Product truth to preserve

- Hebrew-first Jewish dating for Israel, with English support
- serious, respectful, verified dating
- Daily Picks + Explore
- Hard Filters + Soft Preferences + Learned Taste
- visible trust system
- assistive AI only
- premium calm

## Non-negotiable red lines

- no public attractiveness scores
- no hot-or-not mechanics
- no anonymous random chat
- no AI auto-send
- no protected-trait inference from photos
- no hidden ranking or filter manipulation
- no client-side secrets
- no uncontrolled production writes

## Validation

- run: [commands]
- verify flow: [manual path]
- add tests for: [areas]

## Approval gates

Check any that apply:

- [ ] auth or permission boundary change
- [ ] schema migration or persistence rewrite
- [ ] ranking authority change
- [ ] moderation consequence change
- [ ] production config change
- [ ] destructive side effect

## Definition of done

- requested slice exists in usable form
- relevant path works end to end within scope
- validation actually ran or the blocker is explicit
- no obvious red-line or trust regression introduced

## Required final output

- summary of changes
- user flow affected
- files changed
- what was verified
- risks or unknowns
- anything needing product, trust, or policy review

## Approval rule

Do not merge automatically. Keep the change reviewable.
